name: UCloud
description: Independent Chinese cloud provider (优刻得) offering UHost compute, UK8S Kubernetes, GPU cloud, databases and edge. STAR Market-listed.

seo.title: UCloud — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: UCloud: Independent Chinese cloud provider (优刻得) offering UHost compute, UK8S Kubernetes, GPU cloud, databases and edge. STAR Market-listed.

when_to_use: Independent Chinese public cloud with GPU and Kubernetes
Object storage and edge CDN for Chinese internet companies
STAR Market-listed alternative Chinese cloud for startups
Compute and database services with Chinese data sovereignty
GPU cloud for AI training in mainland China

pros: Independent Chinese provider, not aligned to BAT
Full stack: compute, K8s, GPU, databases
cons: English docs trail the Chinese versions
Smaller ecosystem than Alibaba or Tencent cloud
Cross-border data rules add compliance work
review.verdict: Reasonable independent Chinese cloud for domestic workloads, weak choice if you need global reach.
review.best_for: Companies deploying workloads inside China that want a non-BAT vendor
review.not_for: Global teams needing multi-region coverage outside Asia
